title: moquiniastrum polymorphum subsp. polymorphum
intro: Moquiniastrum polymorphum subsp. polymorphum, also known as the 'Quebracho Colorado', is a plant species that belongs to the family Mimosaceae. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Moquiniastrum polymorphum subsp. polymorphum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts to harness its potential health benefits.
